name: I Never Dreamed Of Love Until It Burned Out
original_name: I Never Dreamed Of Love Until It Burned Out
overview: I Never Dreamed Of Love Until It Burned Out follows the harrowing descent of Alexis Diamond White, a seventeen-year-old romantic whose "dream" relationship with the brooding Rockland Gregor devolves into a claustrophobic nightmare of control, isolation, and survival.
